title: Why Cashiers Can't Sit

scenes.text: Most cashiers in the USA are not allowed to sit down!
This policy is often due to strict store policies and safety regulations.
Standing for long hours can lead to serious health risks.
An exhausting job with hidden dangers!
scenes.label: HIDDEN DANGERS

scenes.text: Follow for a mind-blowing fact every day.

description: In the USA, most cashiers cannot sit during their shifts, leading to potential health issues. Follow for more unbelievable job facts!
